fields.label: Policy Name
fields.description: Descriptive name for this data quality policy

fields.label: Policy Code
fields.description: Unique identifier (slug) for this policy. Example: amazon-listing-requirements

fields.label: Policy Type
fields.options:
Global
Product Family
Channel
Brand
Custom
fields.description: Scope of this policy (Global applies to all products)

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this policy

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Policy priority (lower = higher priority). Higher priority policies are evaluated first

fields.label: Apply to Product Families
fields.description: Product families this policy applies to

fields.label: Apply to Channels
fields.description: Channels this policy applies to

fields.label: Apply to Brands
fields.description: Brands this policy applies to

fields.label: Exclude Product Families
fields.description: Product families to exclude from this global policy

fields.label: Validation Rules
fields.description: Define validation rules for data quality checks

fields.label: Enforcement Mode
fields.description: Strict: Block save on errors. Warning: Show warnings but allow save. Audit: Log only

fields.label: Block Publish on Failure
fields.description: Prevent publishing products that fail this policy's validation rules

fields.label: Run on Save
fields.description: Automatically validate products when saved

fields.label: Run on Import
fields.description: Validate products during bulk import operations

fields.label: Run in Scheduled Scans
fields.description: Include this policy in scheduled data quality scans

fields.label: Include in Quality Score
fields.description: Include this policy's rules in overall data quality score calculation

fields.label: Policy Weight
fields.description: Weight multiplier for this policy in score calculation

fields.label: Minimum Pass Rate
fields.description: Minimum percentage of rules that must pass for the policy to be considered passed

fields.label: Notify on Failure
fields.description: Send notification when products fail this policy

fields.label: Notification Recipients
fields.description: Email addresses to notify on failure (comma-separated)

fields.label: Notification Frequency
fields.description: How often to send failure notifications

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of this policy and its purpose

fields.label: Total Products Evaluated
fields.description: Number of products evaluated by this policy

fields.label: Total Products Passed
fields.description: Number of products that passed this policy

fields.label: Total Products Failed
fields.description: Number of products that failed this policy

fields.label: Last Scan Date
fields.description: When this policy was last used in a quality scan

fields.label: Pass Rate
fields.description: Percentage of products that passed this policy
